name: Hero's Journey
description: The 12-stage mythic structure from 'The Hero with a Thousand Faces' and 'The Writer's Journey'. Universal across cultures and genres.

children.title: Ordinary World
children.synopsis: The hero's normal life before the adventure begins.

scenes.title: Ordinary World
scenes.synopsis: Establish who the hero is and what their life looks like.

children.title: Call to Adventure
children.synopsis: The hero receives an invitation to face the unknown.

scenes.title: Call to Adventure
scenes.synopsis: Something disrupts the ordinary world and beckons the hero.

children.title: Refusal of the Call
children.synopsis: The hero hesitates or refuses, showing their fear.

scenes.title: Refusal of the Call
scenes.synopsis: Fear, doubt, or obligation holds the hero back.

children.title: Meeting the Mentor
children.synopsis: The hero encounters a guide who provides wisdom or tools.

scenes.title: Meeting the Mentor
scenes.synopsis: A wise figure gives the hero what they need to begin.

children.title: Crossing the Threshold
children.synopsis: The hero commits to the adventure and enters the special world.

scenes.title: Crossing the Threshold
scenes.synopsis: The hero leaves the ordinary world behind.

children.title: Tests, Allies, Enemies
children.synopsis: The hero navigates the new world, making friends and foes.

scenes.title: Tests, Allies, Enemies
scenes.synopsis: The hero learns the rules of the special world.

children.title: Approach to the Inmost Cave
children.synopsis: The hero prepares for the major challenge ahead.

scenes.title: Approach to the Inmost Cave
scenes.synopsis: Preparation and planning before the central ordeal.

children.title: The Ordeal
children.synopsis: The hero faces their greatest fear or most dangerous challenge.

scenes.title: The Ordeal
scenes.synopsis: A death-and-rebirth moment. The hero's darkest hour.

children.title: Reward
children.synopsis: The hero claims the treasure or achieves the goal.

scenes.title: Reward
scenes.synopsis: After surviving the ordeal, the hero seizes the prize.

children.title: The Road Back
children.synopsis: The hero begins the journey home, but faces new dangers.

scenes.title: The Road Back
scenes.synopsis: The hero must deal with the consequences of the ordeal.

children.title: Resurrection
children.synopsis: A final test where the hero must use everything they've learned.

scenes.title: Resurrection
scenes.synopsis: The climactic battle or challenge. The hero is transformed.

children.title: Return with the Elixir
children.synopsis: The hero returns home changed, bringing benefit to the ordinary world.

scenes.title: Return with the Elixir
scenes.synopsis: The hero shares what they've gained. The world is renewed.
